summary: Comprehensive testing of Actuary Marketplace Enhancement feature. All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all features including directory listing, search/sort, quote request dialog, My Requests tab, quote detail dialog with progress bar, and MV Calculator marketplace CTA.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: GET /api/actuary-marketplace returns 6 mock actuaries with correct structure
GET /api/actuary-marketplace/{id} returns actuary details
GET /api/actuary-marketplace/{invalid_id} returns 404
POST /api/marketplace/quotes creates a new quote request
POST /api/marketplace/quotes rejects duplicate active requests
GET /api/marketplace/quotes returns employer's quotes
GET /api/marketplace/quotes/{id} returns quote details
PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/respond accepts a quote
PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/respond rejects a quote
Cannot respond to non-pending quote (400 error)
PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/pay processes mock payment
Cannot pay already paid quote (400 error)
PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/deliver delivers certification
Cannot deliver to non-paid quote (400 error)
PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/validate validates certification
Plan MV is updated after certification validation
PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/validate rejects certification for resubmission
Actuary can resubmit certification after rejection
Delivery count increments on resubmission
GET /api/notifications returns user notifications with unread count
PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read
POST /api/mv/calculate-form returns needs_actuarial_certification flag
All endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Invalid quote/plan/actuary IDs return 404
Frontend: Actuary Marketplace page loads with 6 actuary cards
Frontend: Search filter works correctly
Frontend: Sort dropdown has 4 options (rating, price low/high, turnaround)
Frontend: Request Quote dialog opens with actuary details, plan selector, message field
Frontend: My Requests tab shows active and completed quotes with status badges
Frontend: Quote Detail dialog shows progress bar (Requested→Accepted→Paid→Delivered→Validated)
Frontend: Quote Detail dialog shows plan details and certification result
Frontend: Quote request submission works and shows success toast
Frontend: MV Calculator shows 'Actuary Marketplace' CTA when plan needs certification
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding DialogDescription component

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all marketplace UI components and integrations working)

test_credentials.note: Test employer 'Demo Corp' with plan 'Gold PPO 2025' used for testing

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create unique test users and data with UUID-based emails. Frontend tests use existing test@demo.com user.

mocked_apis.payment_processing: Payment is mocked (no real payment processor) - PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/pay always succeeds
mocked_apis.actuary_directory: Actuary directory uses hardcoded MOCK_ACTUARIES (6 actuaries with IDs act-1 through act-6)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Actuary Marketplace feature fully tested and working. Full quote lifecycle verified: request → accept → pay → deliver → validate. Resubmission flow also verified: deliver → reject → resubmit → validate. Frontend displays all states correctly with progress bar. MV Calculator correctly shows marketplace CTA when plan needs actuarial certification (MV < 60% or non-standard plan).
